title: A solution for every need
description: Whether you just want to understand what's possible or have a digital right-hand man every day, there's a plan for you.

cards.title: Consultation
cards.description: Tell me about your day, I'll show you what can be optimized. No commitment, no jargon.

cards.title: One-time project
cards.description: You have a specific need. I build and deliver the turnkey solution. An automation, a tool, an integration.

cards.title: Subscription
cards.description: You want a digital right-hand man available every month for your new needs. I become your outsourced IT department.
